calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree CSR: L. Gillian #12355.

Susan Parkinson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) Andreww Lambert.
Plaintiff's Witness: Andrew Lambert was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s). Brian Burgess.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Brian Burgess for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $ 475.00
Holdover damages - $ 2442.64
Costs - $ 0.00
Total judgment in the amount of $ - 2817.64
The lease is forfieted : 1010 Bust Street, # 308, San Francisco, CA 94109.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Andrew Lambert is present.
Attorney Susan Parkinson appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nona Lee IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of DEC-27-2011 remains on calendar.
